title: Cheap/free tier has no working secondary fallback (Cerebras/OpenRouter keys unset)
current_state: RESOLVED 2026-06-21: CEREBRAS_API_KEY and OPENROUTER_API_KEY both set in .env. Cheap tier now has 4 configured providers: cerebras (first, free/generous) → groq → gemini → openrouter (:free model). normie survives Groq exhaustion via Cerebras fallback.
target_state: At least one always-available free provider in the cheap tier. Recommend Cerebras (free, fast, generous TPD).
migration_plan: 2. DONE: OPENROUTER_API_KEY set in .env (free model: meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct:free).
3. Router picks up both automatically on next Pi start.
4. Optional: short retry/backoff on 429 before _mark_brownout — deferred.
risk_notes: Config-only change. No payment method registered on OpenRouter; Pi uses :free model only.
